title: P1: Fix CommandExecutionEnabled default (docs say false, initializer is true)
description: ChatOptions.CommandExecutionEnabled is documented as defaulting to false, but the initializer is true. Fix: change default to false to match documentation. This is a breaking change — announce per BREAKING_CHANGES.md policy. Also add a runtime guard in HandleChatEventAsync that rejects intent='command' when execution is disabled (currently only affects the prompt).
